## BaseMoldId type

Mold identifier within a single source Character restrictions: alphanumeric, dashes, underscores only (no dots) Pattern: /^\[a-zA-Z0-9\_-\]+$/

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type BaseMoldId = Brand<string, 'BaseMoldId'>;
```
